completed_tasks.name: S17-18: Li criterion fully decomposed (lambda_n = Gamma + zeta)
S19: Gamma positivity proved (n>=8), zeta bound = RH (circularity)
S19: Connes W_02 exact (eq 4.2), W_p exact (eq 4.3)
S19: Connes W_R regularized integral (approximate, trending correct)
S19: xi_hat secular equation — zeros trend toward zeta zeros (#10 within 1%)

remaining_tasks.name: Implement exact W_R via 2F1 hypergeometric + digamma (eqs 4.5-4.7)
Switch to mpmath 200dp for Connes computation (N=120)
Investigate the educated guess gap: is xi ~ k_lambda provable?

blockers.blocker: W_R needs exact 2F1(a,b;c;z) at complex arguments from paper eqs 4.5-4.7

decisions.decision: Connes framework structurally verified — xi_hat zeros converge toward zeta zeros
decisions.rationale: With approximate W_R, zero #10 is within 0.94% of gamma_10. Higher zeros match better than lower ones. Framework is correct, needs precision.

decisions.decision: Exact W_R is the key missing piece for paper-quality results
decisions.rationale: Paper's eqs 4.5-4.7 involve 2F1 hypergeometric, digamma at complex args, and Hurwitz-Lerch Phi. Our regularized integral is approximate.

next_action: SESSION 20: Implement exact W_R from eqs 4.5-4.7 using mpmath.hyp2f1 and mpmath.digamma. Increase to N=120 with 200dp precision. Target: reproduce the paper's 10^{-60} zero matching. This is computationally intensive but straightforward — all needed functions are in mpmath.
context_notes: Sessions 17-19 produced 12 scripts. Li: li_criterion.py through li_zeta_bound.py (10 scripts). Connes: connes_weil.py (first pass), connes_spectral.py (from zeros), connes_exact.py (corrected W_R). Key formulas: W_02 = 32L*sinh^2(L/4)*(L^2-16pi^2mn)/[...] (eq 4.2). xi_hat(z) = 2/sqrt(L)*sin(zL/2)*sum xi_j/(z-2pi*j/L) (eq 5.25). Python: /c/Python313/python.exe.
